title: Harihareshwara Temple
tagline: Harihareshwara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Harihareshwara Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Harihar, Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: Harihareshwara Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Harihar, Karnataka state, India. The temple was built in c. 1223–1224 CE by Polalva, a commander and minister of the Hoysala Empire King Vira Narasimha II. In 1268 CE, Soma, a commander of King Narasimha III of the same dynasty made some additions. The temple houses the deity Harihara, a fusion of the Hindu gods Vishnu and Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Harihar
topPlaces.description: Harihara ([harihəra] also called Harihar) is a city in Davanagere District in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is the administrative headquarters of the Harihara Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Basilica of Our Lady of Health, Harihar
topPlaces.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of Health located in Harihar in India is a pilgrimage centre dedicated to Our Lady of Health. The Shrine has been frequented by the people irrespective of caste, language and religion.

image.alt: Basilica of Our Lady of Health, Harihar

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Harihareshwara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Harihareshwara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Harihareshwara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (122 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (117 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Harihareshwara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Harihareshwara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Harihareshwara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Harihareshwara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Harihareshwara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Harihar, Basilica of Our Lady of Health, Harihar, Doddabathi, Belludi, Kodiyal.
